# Franco and Sons Construction LLC

> Family-owned general contractor serving Lincoln, Roseville, Rocklin, and Placer County, California since 2004. Licensed, bonded, and insured.

## About

Franco and Sons Construction LLC is a father-and-son construction company founded by Carlos Franco with over 30 years of experience. Based in Lincoln, California, we specialize in residential and commercial remodeling with a focus on quality craftsmanship, transparent pricing, and start-to-finish project management.

## Services

### Kitchen Remodeling
Complete kitchen transformations including custom cabinetry, countertop installation (granite, quartz, marble), open-concept wall removal, kitchen island design, lighting upgrades, and full layout redesigns.
URL: https://www.francoandsonsconstruction.com/services/kitchen-remodeling

### Bathroom Remodeling
Full bathroom renovations including walk-in shower conversions, custom tile installation, vanity and cabinet installation, master bath remodels, and guest bathroom updates.
URL: https://www.francoandsonsconstruction.com/services/bathroom-remodeling

### Commercial Remodeling
Tenant improvements, office build-outs, retail space renovation, restaurant and hospitality construction, and commercial ADA compliance.
URL: https://www.francoandsonsconstruction.com/services/commercial-remodeling

### ADA / Accessible Bathroom Remodeling
Low-threshold walk-in showers, grab bars, built-in benches, slip-resistant tile, and doorway widening for safety and independence.
URL: https://www.francoandsonsconstruction.com/services/ada-accessible-remodeling

### Home Additions
Room additions, second-story additions, garage conversions, ADU construction, and sunroom enclosures.
URL: https://www.francoandsonsconstruction.com/services/home-additions

### Interior Remodeling
Open-concept conversions, living room renovations, ceiling modifications, built-in shelving, and complete room makeovers.
URL: https://www.francoandsonsconstruction.com/services/interior-remodeling

### Custom Showers
Frameless glass enclosures, custom tile design, walk-in showers, multi-head shower systems, and expert waterproofing.
URL: https://www.francoandsonsconstruction.com/services/custom-showers

### Flooring Installation
Ceramic and porcelain tile, natural stone, hardwood, luxury vinyl plank, heated floor systems, and custom tile patterns.
URL: https://www.francoandsonsconstruction.com/services/flooring-installation

### Electrical and Plumbing Upgrades
Panel upgrades, new circuits, lighting fixtures, plumbing fixture replacement, and code compliance updates.
URL: https://www.francoandsonsconstruction.com/services/electrical-plumbing

### Interior Home Painting
Full interior painting, accent walls, cabinet painting, ceiling texturing, color consultation, and surface preparation.
URL: https://www.francoandsonsconstruction.com/services/interior-painting

### Exterior Home Improvements
Siding, trim, decks, patios, exterior painting, window and door installation, gutters, and fencing.
URL: https://www.francoandsonsconstruction.com/services/exterior-improvements
